DESCRIPTION:
DOCUMENTED SAUCEDEMO DEFECT (not an accidental skip).

For `error_user`, the Last Name field on Checkout Step One rejects typed characters. This test asserts the CORRECT behaviour (the field SHOULD accept input), so against the live broken site it fails on purpose and pytest reports XFAIL — Allure shows this as grey.

This is the EXPECTED state. The day SauceDemo fixes the bug, the test will XPASS, which is our signal to remove the xfail marker and promote it to a normal passing test.
NAME: test_error_user_can_type_last_name_at_checkout[chromium]

DESCRIPTION:
A7: POST /pet/{id}/uploadImage accepts a multipart file upload.

Sandbox limitation (see api-tests.md): the uploaded image can't be
retrieved afterward, so we assert only that the server accepted the file
(HTTP 200) and reported it in the response message.
NAME: test_upload_pet_image_returns_200
